diIssues.title: Missing explicit DI registration signals for module 'Login4'
diIssues.evidence: Program/Startup scan did not find module-specific AddScoped/AddTransient registrations.

recommendedStructure: Modules/Login4/Application for use cases and contracts
Modules/Login4/Infrastructure for persistence and external adapters
Modules/Login4/Web for controllers and view models
Composition root (Program/Startup) for DI wiring only
